untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-market price divergence detection and cross-market arbitrage execution. The allowed indicators only support single-asset technical analysis (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). The core logic requires: (1) real-time price comparison across two different markets/venues, (2) bid-ask spread analysis across multiple venues, (3) conditional long/short direction based on which market is cheaper, and (4) position coordination across markets. None of these multi-market microstructure elements can be expressed using the single-asset indicators available (close, sma_*, rsi_*, etc.). This is a structural arbitrage strategy, not a single-security technical signal.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_1_2 describes a market microstructure play requiring cross-venue price feeds and execution coordination. The backtest engine as specified only supports single-instrument technical analysis. To implement this signal, the engine would need: (1) multi-market price data feeds, (2) bid-ask level data, (3) latency/execution modeling, and (4) portfolio-level position tracking across venues.
